scripts.sync-versions: node -e "const v = require('fs').readFileSync('VERSION','utf8').trim(); ['apps/api/package.json','apps/web/package.json','apps/docs/package.json'].forEach(f => { const p = require('./'+f); p.version = v; require('fs').writeFileSync(f, JSON.stringify(p, null, 2) + '\n'); }); console.log('Versions synced to', v);"
